zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Cheney於1444年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Cheney33歲，母親Eleanor Shottesbroke23歲。他於1457年與Isabella Boleyn結婚。他去世於1487年5月8日享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Cheney于1444年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Cheney33岁，母亲Eleanor Shottesbroke23岁。他于1457年与Isabella Boleyn结婚。他去世于1487年5月8日享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Cheney was born in 1444, in England, his father, Sir John Cheney, was 33 and his mother, Eleanor Shottesbroke, was 23. He married Isabella Boleyn in 1457. He died on 8 May 1487, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Cheney est né en 1444, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Cheney, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Shottesbroke, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Boleyn en 1457. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1487, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Cheney 1444 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Cheney 33 und seine Mutter Eleanor Shottesbroke 23. Er hat 1457 Isabella Boleyn geheiratet. Er starb am 8. Mai 1487 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cheney è nato il nel 1444 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Cheney, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Shottesbroke, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Boleyn nel 1457. Morì il 8 maggio 1487, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheneyが1444年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Cheneyは33歳，母Eleanor Shottesbrokeは23歳であった。1457年にIsabella Boleynと結婚した。彼は1487年5月8日に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheney(이)가 1444년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cheney(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Shottesbroke(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1457년 Isabella Boleyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1487년 5월 8일 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cheney nasceu em 1444, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Cheney, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Shottesbroke, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Boleyn em 1457. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1487, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Cheney родился в 1444 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Cheney было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Shottesbroke, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Boleyn в 1457 г. Он умер 8 мая 1487 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Cheney nació en 1444, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Cheney, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Eleanor Shottesbroke, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Isabella Boleyn en 1457. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1487, a la edad de 43 años.
